title: salix aurita var. appendiculata
intro: Salix aurita var. appendiculata, also known as the appendiculate or alpine willow, is a variety of the Salix aurita plant, a type of willow tree native to mountainous regions in Europe. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Salix aurita var. appendiculata include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and supporting cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
